nodes.name: Merge Lead and Lookup

nodes.name: Update Stored Timestamp
nodes.notes: Updates the row where key=config with new storedTimestamp. Same sheet as Read Last Timestamp.

nodes.name: Compute Max After Loop
nodes.notes: Runs only when Split In Batches (Done) fires. Reads from Accumulate Leads to avoid timestamp race.

nodes.name: Read Last Timestamp
nodes.notes: Configure: Document (spreadsheet), Sheet. Sheet must have columns 'key' (A) and 'storedTimestamp' (B). Row 2: key=config, storedTimestamp=<ISO date>. Output field: storedTimestamp.
